overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character traversing Night City's neon-lit streets at night. The character moves from a covered commercial walkway into more open urban areas, passing under overpasses and alongside vehicle traffic while futuristic skyscrapers loom in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial pedestrian walkway with neon signage

events.description: character gradually increases pace from walking to jogging

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the yellow-textured sidewalk beneath glowing neon signs and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall digital billboard displaying colorful animated advertisements with cyberpunk aesthetic
illuminated storefront sign with bright yellow neon lettering spelling URBAN GARDEN
elevated transit track structure spanning across the street overhead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered commercial sidewalk with moderate pedestrian traffic. Neon signs including the URBAN GARDEN storefront illuminate the right side while a large vertical anime billboard dominates the left. The ground features distinctive yellow textured paving tiles.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional walkway beneath concrete overpasses with reduced commercial activity

events.description: character breaks into a full run, significantly increasing movement speed
passing underneath a massive concrete overpass with dimmer lighting conditions

agents.ego_description: sprinting along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, weaving past sparse pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near a concrete planter box on the right sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge structure with thick support columns creating a covered passage
red neon signage for a pizza restaurant with illuminated lettering

segments.scene_description: The character transitions to running through a more industrial section beneath concrete overpasses. The crowd thins out significantly as the environment becomes more enclosed. The PIZZA PADRE sign becomes visible on the right while the area takes on a grittier appearance with graffiti and debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with vehicle traffic and towering corporate skyscrapers

events.description: passing extremely close to a parked white sports car on the right side
emerging into a more open area with clear view of distant mega-skyscrapers against the night sky

agents.ego_description: walking along the street past parked vehicles and storefronts while observing the surrounding traffic

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk with headlights on

entered.detail: large pink and purple neon sign reading BRAIN WASH mounted on a building facade
towering futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows visible in the distance
sleek white futuristic sports vehicle parked at the curb with aerodynamic design
large cylindrical building component with teal accent lighting and metallic surface

segments.scene_description: The character moves along a more open street section with visible sky and distant skyscrapers. The iconic BRAIN WASH neon sign dominates the right side while various vehicles including a black sports car move along the road. The environment transitions from enclosed to exposed, revealing the massive scale of the city's corporate architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a crowded commercial walkway into the gritty industrial underbelly of the city before opening up to a vast urban vista. It begins on a covered sidewalk with yellow textured paving, passing beneath a large vertical anime billboard and the glowing neon of an Urban Garden storefront. As the character breaks into a run, the scene shifts into a more enclosed industrial section beneath concrete overpasses where the crowds thin and the environment becomes grittier, marked by graffiti and a Pizza Padre sign. The camera then emerges from these shadows into an open street, where the scale of the city expands to reveal towering corporate skyscrapers and moving traffic. Finally, the view opens fully to the night sky, dominated on the right by the iconic Brain Wash neon sign and the sleek silhouette of a black sports car.
